languages.text: {n}Платформа, несущая на себе скорбную тень святого воина, поднимается вверх и отходит куда-то в сторону, в сложное переплетение металлических колонн. Возможно, взобраться на одну из ей подобных — единственный способ покинуть это место.{/n}

{n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Платформа, несущая на себе скорбную тень святого воина, поднимается вверх и отходит куда-то в сторону, в сложное переплетение металлических колонн. Возможно, взобраться на одну из ей подобных — единственный способ покинуть это место.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

{n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

{n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

languages.text: {n}聖戦士の哀愁漂う姿は、複雑に絡み合う金属の柱へと昇っていく。この場所から脱出するには、柱の頂上を目指すしかないのかもしれない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 聖戦士の哀愁漂う姿は、複雑に絡み合う金属の柱へと昇っていく。この場所から脱出するには、柱の頂上を目指すしかないのかもしれない。

languages.text: {n}La plataforma, que lleva la lastimosa sombra del guerrero santo, se eleva camino de una maraña compleja de columnas de metal. Tal vez escalarlas sea la única salida de este lugar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La plataforma, que lleva la lastimosa sombra del guerrero santo, se eleva camino de una maraña compleja de columnas de metal. Tal vez escalarlas sea la única salida de este lugar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}平台载着那神圣战士悲怆的残影升起，没入上方那错综复杂的金属柱丛中。也许，攀爬这些立柱是离开此地的唯一出路。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}平台载着那神圣战士悲怆的残影升起，没入上方那错综复杂的金属柱丛中。也许，攀爬这些立柱是离开此地的唯一出路。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Plattform mit dem schwermütigen Schatten des heiligen Kriegers wird angehoben und verschwindet in einem komplizierten Gewirr aus metallenen Säulen. Möglicherweise sind diese Säulen der einzige Weg, diesen Ort zu verlassen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Plattform mit dem schwermütigen Schatten des heiligen Kriegers wird angehoben und verschwindet in einem komplizierten Gewirr aus metallenen Säulen. Möglicherweise sind diese Säulen der einzige Weg, diesen Ort zu verlassen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kutsal savaşçının kederli gölgesini taşıyan platform, yükselip metal sütunların karmaşık düğümüne doğru uzaklaşıyor. Belki de bu sütunlardan birine tırmanmak, buradan ayrılmanın tek yoludur.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kutsal savaşçının kederli gölgesini taşıyan platform, yükselip metal sütunların karmaşık düğümüne doğru uzaklaşıyor. Belki de bu sütunlardan birine tırmanmak, buradan ayrılmanın tek yoludur.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La plateforme s'élève, emportant avec elle l'ombre lugubre du guerrier sacré, et disparaît dans un enchevêtrement complexe de colonnes métalliques. Grimper à l'une de ces colonnes est peut-être le seul moyen de quitter cet endroit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The platform, carrying the mournful shadow of the holy warrior, rises up and away, into an intricate tangle of metal columns. Perhaps climbing one of those columns is the only way to leave this place.{/n}
